nodes.label: main.ideas.v1 (decision record N1-N3, S1-S15)
nodes.rationale: The committed decision record the reports bank their deltas to (S9, S10, S11, S12, S13, S14, S15); flagged not silently applied, never retro-editing frozen architecture snapshots.

nodes.label: SCFF (Self-Contrastive Forward-Forward)
nodes.rationale: The cheap ~80% brain: unsupervised, local, forward-only, label-free feature learner; no backward pass leaves the chip. Its energy goodness makes it a density learner (density != class).

nodes.label: density != class (the through-line fault)
nodes.rationale: SCFF energy goodness G=Sigma||h||^2 makes a layer loud on coherent input and quiet on mixtures, so it learns where data is DENSE, recovering classes only when classes are density clusters. The recurring fault that travels through all phases.

nodes.label: The spine (read class DIRECTION, never a MAGNITUDE)
nodes.rationale: The project's founding bet: direction is the one expensive thing in learning, pay for it once. A measurement axis that sometimes bends (P7's magnitude-winning namer) — saying which is what makes the record credible.

nodes.label: The 80/20 split (SCFF cortex + GD namer)
nodes.rationale: ~80% cheap unsupervised SCFF organizes the world for free; ~20% precise namer maps features to labels. Metered real at P8 (GD-share 0.121); the gate CREATES the split.

nodes.label: Memorization gap (train-on-seen minus held-out)
nodes.rationale: The headline metric of exp1: structure vs rote. Only means something on a repeating/seen-buffer; ~0 by construction under fresh-draw single pass. Pinned in result-format to avoid silent rot.

nodes.label: The continual regime (the architecture's home)
nodes.rationale: The validated win: online backprop rots to chance while SCFF is forgetting-robust (new classes add clusters), so a periodic sleep recovers the static ceiling. The regime the substrate was built for.

nodes.label: Sleep consolidation (periodic closed-form re-fit)
nodes.rationale: S7 — the continual recovery mechanism: re-forward the raw-prototype LUT through the current SCFF and re-solve the namer on fresh consistent features. Works because SCFF features never forget (only the readout drifts).

nodes.label: LUT prototype memory (the hippocampus stub)
nodes.rationale: S8 — prototype store replayed at sleep; recovers at ~1/3 of the full store. A service, not a parallel brain; grown into the hippocampus organ is the next north-star build.

nodes.label: Mono-forward dual-rail (the forward scheme)
nodes.rationale: S2 — one forward sweep carries a positive + negative world side by side through the SAME shared crossbar; only the cheap activation buffers double, not the Scap weights. Cost claim measured: backward cost flat in depth.

nodes.label: Scap (synapse weight = analog charge + SRAM sign bit)
nodes.rationale: The atom of storage: magnitude held as analog charge on a capacitor plus a digital SRAM sign bit; compute happens in the wires (crossbar MAC as physical current). Carried from the old world unchanged.

nodes.label: InfoNCE contrast objective + coordination window
nodes.rationale: Phase 3 reframe: swap energy goodness (preserves density) for contrast (preserves class) + a forward-only cross-layer coordination window w>=2; composes depth. Adopted, supersedes energy-goodness Sigma h^2. Temp 0.2 (P5) sharpens it.

nodes.label: Energy goodness (SUM Sigma||h||^2, theta=2.0)
nodes.rationale: The FF-style objective corrected at exp0 to the SUM (not the paper's mean, which starves deep layers below theta), threshold 2.0, input-norm on. The lever that builds the density-not-class wall; superseded by contrast at Phase 3.

nodes.label: SCFFContrastOverlap (the Phase-5 committed cell)
nodes.rationale: temp0.2 / w2, L12 bulk, NO residual, fixed-reader deploy. Depth earned back by a sharper objective (readout beats tuned-BP); read 8x cheaper by a short fixed stack. The v1.0.0 pre-noise cheap brain.

nodes.label: Residual boosting chain (N3, dropped)
nodes.rationale: Chain of shallow GD-corrected blocks on a residual stream; beats a single block but saturates ~2 blocks and wants diversity (full residual eps=1). Dropped in Stage 2 (the forward-leak wall) -> single frozen bulk + read-only namer (S11).

nodes.label: NoiseAugContrast (the Stage-1 committed cell)
nodes.rationale: S10 — the frozen Phase-5 SCFFContrastOverlap cell + one iid-noise-augmented InfoNCE view (sigma_aug=1.0). Noise robustness lives in the base representation, not the readout; the SCFF bulk of the frozen object.

nodes.label: Capability map (P4: substrate-native continual learner)
nodes.rationale: Phase 4's 7-axis scorecard vs genuinely-tuned BP: WINS continual/nuisance-dim/depth-composition/depth-is-cheap, TRAILS static difficulty/class-count, one honest NEGATIVE on eval-time weight noise (A7). The identity re-confirmed at P10/P11.

nodes.label: Depth composition (coordination window, the P3 overturn)
nodes.rationale: The wall was the energy objective, not forward-only locality: contrast + coordination window composes depth on a headroom task (w4 rises monotonically). Overturned Phase 2's 'intrinsic locality' verdict.

hyperedges.label: The density != class through-line across the phases
